_comment: Minimal n8n workflow with a Schedule Trigger and an Error Workflow reference. Import via UI or API. Replace placeholders.
name: <workflow name>
_active_comment: Set to true after testing. Activating in JSON without testing is a footgun.

settings._errorWorkflow_comment: Points at a shared failure-classifier workflow. CLI runs do NOT trigger this - only auto-runs do.

parameters._comment: Replace this with your real first step (HTTP Request, Code, etc.)
